ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "project" TEXT /* Project the repository belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the repository was created */,
  "last_commit" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last commit to the repository */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Name of the default branch */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the repository is private */,
  "fork_count" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the repository */,
  "star_count" INTEGER /* Number of stars the repository has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the pull request belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of the pull request */,
  "sha" TEXT /* SHA of the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was last updated */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was closed */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pull request was merged */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pull request */,
  "base_branch" TEXT /* Name of the base branch to which the pull request is made */,
  "head_branch" TEXT /* Name of the head branch from which the pull request is made */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is reviewing the pull request */,
  "merge_commit_sha" TEXT /* SHA of the merge commit if the pull request is merged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the file belongs to */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., modified, added, deleted) */,
  "additions" INTEGER /* Number of lines added to the file */,
  "deletions" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted from the file */,
  "patch" TEXT /* Diff patch of the file changes */,
  "file_size_before" INTEGER /* Size of the file before changes */,
  "file_size_after" INTEGER /* Size of the file after changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_files_pull_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, maintainer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_assignees" (
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignee */,
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the assignee is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the pull request */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was assigned to the pull request */,
  "unassigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was unassigned from the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_assignees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_assignees_pull_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_comments_pull_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_comments_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the label is assigned to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_labels_pull_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the milestone is assigned to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the milestone was closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_request_milestones_pull_id FOREIGN KEY ("pull_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pull_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_stats" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "pull_requests" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests in the repository */,
  "commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits in the repository */,
  "contributors" INTEGER /* Number of contributors to the repository */,
  "issues" INTEGER /* Number of issues in the repository */,
  "pull_requests_open" INTEGER /* Number of open pull requests */,
  "pull_requests_closed" INTEGER /* Number of closed pull requests */,
  "pull_requests_merged" INTEGER /* Number of merged pull requests */,
  "issues_open" INTEGER /* Number of open issues */,
  "issues_closed" INTEGER /* Number of closed issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_request_stats" (
  "pull_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "additions" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the pull request */,
  "deletions" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted in the pull request */,
  "files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the pull request */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the pull request */,
  "review_comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of review comments on the pull request */,
  "participants_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique participants in the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pull_id")
)
